data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for an alternative link if the primary link fails. However, the evidence provided does not include any information or checks regarding the existence or functionality of an alternative link. The linked use case only describes the generation of a primary Zoom link without addressing the fallback mechanism, indicating a clear gap in requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of an alternative link being generated if the primary link fails.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Verify alternative link generation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Check if an alternative link is generated when the primary link fails.
